Issue: Live Chat as separate tile (not in dropdown)
Action: Removed Live Chat from MODES dropdown. Added permanent always-visible card in english-guru.tsx above mode tabs.

Issue: Tutors can't speak native languages / no Indian accent
Action: AI system prompt forces full response in selected uiLang. useSpeechSynthesis hook prefers voices matching locale (hi-IN, ta-IN etc). Avatar speaking animation active during TTS.
All 6 TUTORS and 5 INTERVIEW_COACHES in tutors.ts updated with realistic India-specific specializations, teaching styles, language support, and role bios.

Issue: Language selector doesn't change tutor language
Action: handleConvPhrase system prompt hardened to force full AI response in selected uiLang (e.g. Hindi, Tamil, Telugu). Confirmed working.

Issue: 'My Journey' and '30-Day Plan' look bad, not research-based
Action: ROADMAP_STAGES fully redesigned with CEFR A1–C2 framework. Each stage now shows weeks, daily goal, milestone, resources (India-specific). 30-day plan prompt generates detailed week-by-week plan.
All synth.speak() calls in interview-ace.tsx pass { voiceGender: coach.gender }. Male/female coach voices correctly applied.

Issue: Per-question feedback breaks flow; End button not prominent
Action: submitCurrentAnswer records answer silently with brief acknowledgment only. Full report generated at session end using questionScores. End button styled destructive/red.

Issue: No lip movement / no live video interview
Action: True lip sync requires paid video ML APIs (HeyGen/D-ID). Avatar already has CSS speaking animation (animated-avatar.tsx). Real-time video interview is a platform limitation beyond current scope.
isIndiaRelevantJob() filter added to rozgar.ts backend with word-boundary regex matching for Indian cities/states/Remote.

Issue: Rozgar filter sections poorly presented; not personalized; no profile gate
Action: Profile gate added: users must enter name, state/city, career goal, and experience before seeing the job feed. Gate dismissed state stored in localStorage. Jobs then personalized by profile.

Issue: Resume upload broken, no downloadable output
Action: Upload flow verified (requireAuth middleware, multer memory storage, PDF/DOCX parsing). Added GET /api/resume/download endpoint that returns full analysis as a downloadable .txt file with ATS score, skills, gaps, suggestions.

Issue: Google Sign-in and Email OTP not working
Action: Root cause identified: secrets stored as 'GOOGLE CLIENT ID' (spaces) but code read GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID (underscores). Fixed auth.ts to read both variants with ?? fallback. Same fix for GEMINI API KEY in ai.ts.

Issue: Gemini first, Claude fallback not working
Action: Already implemented in ai.ts: Gemini 2.5 Flash → 1.5 Flash → 2.0 Flash Lite → Claude Haiku → Sonnet fallback chain with rate-limit detection.

Added POST /api/auth/admin-login endpoint (SHA-256 password hash check against ADMIN_USERNAME and ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH env vars). Credentials set as Replit secrets. Admin user seeded in DB on first login.

Replaced 100% hardcoded mock responses in mobile tool/[id].tsx with real Gemini API calls via /api/ai/chat. Each tool has a tailored system prompt. Animated loading indicator added. Error states handled.
